name: images
context: Generate and edit images using DALL-E via the OpenAI Images API
info: The Images API generates, edits, and creates variations of images using DALL-E models. DALL-E 3 generates high-quality images from text prompts with automatic prompt revision for better results. DALL-E 2 supports editing (inpainting with masks) and variations. Images can be returned as URLs (valid for 1 hour) or base64-encoded data. Supported sizes include 1024x1024, 1024x1792, and 1792x1024 for DALL-E 3. Quality can be set to standard or hd. The endpoint is `POST /v1/images/generations` for generation and `POST /v1/images/edits` for editing.
body:
# Images

The Images API generates and edits images using DALL-E models. DALL-E 3 creates high-quality images from text prompts with automatic prompt revision. DALL-E 2 supports editing and variations.

## Generate Images

```javascript
import OpenAI from "openai";

const client = new OpenAI(); // reads OPENAI_API_KEY from env

const response = await client.images.generate({
  model: "dall-e-3",
  prompt: "A serene Japanese garden with a koi pond at sunset, watercolor style",
  size: "1024x1024",
  quality: "hd",
  n: 1,
});

const imageUrl = response.data[0].url;
const revisedPrompt = response.data[0].revised_prompt;
console.log(`Image: ${imageUrl}`);
console.log(`Revised prompt: ${revisedPrompt}`);
```

DALL-E 3 automatically revises your prompt for better results. The `revised_prompt` field shows what was actually sent to the model.

## Edit Images

Edit existing images with inpainting (DALL-E 2 only):

```javascript
import fs from "fs";

const response = await client.images.edit({
  model: "dall-e-2",
  image: fs.createReadStream("original.png"),
  mask: fs.createReadStream("mask.png"), // transparent areas will be filled
  prompt: "A golden retriever sitting on the grass",
  size: "1024x1024",
  n: 1,
});

const editedUrl = response.data[0].url;
```

The mask image must be the same size as the original. Transparent areas in the mask indicate where the model should generate new content.

## Sizes and Quality

### DALL-E 3

| Size | Aspect Ratio | Use Case |
|------|-------------|----------|
| 1024x1024 | Square | Default, avatars, icons |
| 1024x1792 | Portrait | Mobile wallpapers, posters |
| 1792x1024 | Landscape | Headers, banners, scenes |

Quality options:
- **standard** — faster, lower cost
- **hd** — more detailed, higher fidelity

### DALL-E 2

| Size | Notes |
|------|-------|
| 256x256 | Fastest, lowest cost |
| 512x512 | Medium |
| 1024x1024 | Highest quality for DALL-E 2 |

## Prompt Tips

- Be specific about style, medium, lighting, and composition
- Include artistic references: "watercolor", "photorealistic", "oil painting", "digital art"
- Describe the scene in detail: subject, action, setting, mood
- DALL-E 3 revises prompts automatically — check `revised_prompt` to see the expansion
- For consistent styles across multiple images, include the same style descriptor in every prompt
- Avoid prohibited content: the API rejects prompts violating OpenAI's content policy

## Response Format

Images can be returned as:
- **url** — temporary URL valid for ~1 hour (default)
- **b64_json** — base64-encoded PNG data

```javascript
const response = await client.images.generate({
  model: "dall-e-3",
  prompt: "A minimalist logo of a mountain",
  response_format: "b64_json",
});

const base64 = response.data[0].b64_json;
// Save or process the base64 image data
```

sections.title: Generate images
sections.body: Call `client.images.generate()` with model, prompt, size, quality, and n (number of images). DALL-E 3 supports n=1 only. The response contains `data[0].url` or `data[0].b64_json` depending on `response_format`. DALL-E 3 also returns `revised_prompt` showing the expanded prompt used for generation.

sections.title: Edit images
sections.body: Call `client.images.edit()` with an image, mask (transparent areas to fill), prompt, and size. DALL-E 2 only. Both image and mask must be PNG files of the same dimensions. The mask's transparent regions indicate where new content should be generated. Useful for inpainting, object removal, and compositing.

sections.title: Sizes and quality
sections.body: DALL-E 3: 1024x1024 (square), 1024x1792 (portrait), 1792x1024 (landscape). Quality: standard or hd. DALL-E 2: 256x256, 512x512, 1024x1024. Choose size based on aspect ratio needs and quality based on fidelity requirements and budget.

sections.title: Prompt tips
sections.body: Be specific about style, medium, lighting, and composition. Include artistic references (watercolor, photorealistic, oil painting). Describe subject, action, setting, and mood in detail. DALL-E 3 revises prompts automatically — check `revised_prompt` to see expansions. For consistency, reuse style descriptors across prompts.

scripts.name: Generate Image
scripts.description: Generate images using DALL-E via the OpenAI Images API

prompt.description: Text description of the desired image

n.description: Number of images to generate (DALL-E 3: 1 only, DALL-E 2: 1-10)

url.description: Temporary URL of the generated image (valid ~1 hour)

revisedPrompt.description: The prompt as revised by DALL-E 3 (DALL-E 3 only)

depends.reason: Requires an OpenAI API key and client configuration
